summary: Good coverage of core requirements: basic matrix generation, include/exclude rules, max-parallel, fail-fast defaults, matrix size validation, JSON serialization, and end-to-end JSON workflow. Missing edge case coverage for feature_flag matrix size calculations (doesn't test that feature_flag correctly multiplies the cross-product), empty array handling, and thorough error scenarios (invalid JSON input, type mismatches, malformed include/exclude entries, null values, PSCustomObject-to-hashtable conversion). Test design is clean and readable with good context organization, but lacks reusable fixtures/helpers to reduce duplication. Would catch basic regressions in happy-path scenarios but insufficient rigor for production CI/CD system.
